title: isodon irroratus
intro: Isodon irroratus, also known as the Chinese hedyotis or Chinese isodon, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and improving digestion. Isodon irroratus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water, or it can be made into a tincture or capsule for more convenient consumption.
